chart-avg-tokens-per-message.title: Avg Tokens per Model Call

chart-cache-hit-ratio.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
| summarize
    cache_read = sum(toLong(openclaw.tokens.cache_read)),
    cache_write = sum(toLong(openclaw.tokens.cache_write)),
    total_input = sum(toLong(openclaw.tokens.input)),
    total_output = sum(toLong(openclaw.tokens.output))
chart-cache-hit-ratio.title: Cache Efficiency

chart-messages-over-time.title: Messages Over Time by Channel

chart-model-latency-over-time.title: Model Call Latency Over Time (s)

chart-output-tokens-over-time.title: Output Tokens Over Time by Channel

chart-p95-response-time.title: P95 Response Time by Channel (s)

chart-response-time-by-channel.title: Avg Response Time by Channel (s)

chart-response-time-over-time.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.message.processed"
| makeTimeseries avg_duration = avg(toDouble(duration) / 1000000000.0)
chart-response-time-over-time.title: Response Time Over Time (s)

chart-token-breakdown.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
| fieldsAdd token_type = "Input", tokens = toLong(openclaw.tokens.input)
| append [
  fetch spans
  | filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
  | fieldsAdd token_type = "Output", tokens = toLong(openclaw.tokens.output)
]
| append [
  fetch spans
  | filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
  | fieldsAdd token_type = "Cache Read", tokens = toLong(openclaw.tokens.cache_read)
]
| append [
  fetch spans
  | filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
  | fieldsAdd token_type = "Cache Write", tokens = toLong(openclaw.tokens.cache_write)
]
| summarize total = sum(tokens), by: {token_type}
| sort total desc
chart-token-breakdown.title: Token Breakdown

chart-tokens-by-channel.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
| summarize total_tokens = sum(toLong(openclaw.tokens.total)), by: {openclaw.channel}
| sort total_tokens desc
chart-tokens-by-channel.title: Tokens by Channel

chart-tokens-by-model.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
| summarize total_tokens = sum(toLong(openclaw.tokens.total)), by: {openclaw.model}
| sort total_tokens desc
chart-tokens-by-model.title: Tokens by Model

chart-tokens-over-time.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
| makeTimeseries total_tokens = sum(toLong(openclaw.tokens.total))
chart-tokens-over-time.title: Total Tokens Over Time

chart-usage-by-provider.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
| summarize Calls = count(), `Total Tokens` = sum(toLong(openclaw.tokens.total)), by: {Provider = openclaw.provider, Model = openclaw.model}
| sort `Total Tokens` desc
chart-usage-by-provider.title: Usage by Provider

header-main.content:
## OPENCLAW GATEWAY MONITORING
Monitors message processing, LLM token usage, response times, and channel activity for the **OpenClaw** AI gateway.

Data is collected via OpenTelemetry spans from the `openclaw-gateway` service, covering channels like **Telegram** and **Webchat**.

For full setup instructions, see the [GitHub example](https://github.com/dynatrace-oss/dynatrace-ai-agent-instrumentation-examples/tree/main/openclaw) or see [OpenClaw Configuration Reference](https://docs.openclaw.ai/logging#diagnostics-%2B-opentelemetry).

kpi-active-channels.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.message.processed"
| summarize ActiveChannels = countDistinct(openclaw.channel)
kpi-active-channels.title: Active Channels

kpi-avg-response-time.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.message.processed"
| summarize AvgResponseTime = avg(toDouble(duration) / 1000000000.0)
kpi-avg-response-time.title: Avg Response Time (s)

kpi-total-messages.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.message.processed"
| summarize TotalMessages = count()
kpi-total-messages.title: Total Messages

kpi-total-sessions.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
| summarize TotalSessions = countDistinct(openclaw.sessionId)
kpi-total-sessions.title: Unique Sessions

kpi-total-tokens.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(toLong(openclaw.tokens.total))
kpi-total-tokens.title: Total Tokens

pie-message-outcomes.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.message.processed"
| summarize cnt = count(), by: {openclaw.outcome}
| sort cnt desc
pie-message-outcomes.title: Message Outcomes

pie-messages-by-channel.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.message.processed"
| summarize messages = count(), by: {openclaw.channel}
| sort messages desc
pie-messages-by-channel.title: Messages by Channel

table-recent-messages.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.message.processed"
| fieldsAdd Channel = openclaw.channel, ChatId = openclaw.chatId, MessageId = openclaw.messageId, Outcome = openclaw.outcome, `Duration (s)` = toDouble(duration) / 1000000000.0
| fields start_time, Channel, ChatId, MessageId, Outcome, `Duration (s)`
| sort start_time desc
| limit 50
table-recent-messages.title: Recent Messages

table-recent-model-calls.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway" AND span.name == "openclaw.model.usage"
| fieldsAdd Channel = openclaw.channel, Model = openclaw.model, Provider = openclaw.provider, `Input Tokens` = toLong(openclaw.tokens.input), `Output Tokens` = toLong(openclaw.tokens.output), `Cache Read` = toLong(openclaw.tokens.cache_read), `Total Tokens` = toLong(openclaw.tokens.total), `Duration (s)` = toDouble(duration) / 1000000000.0
| fields start_time, Channel, Model, Provider, `Input Tokens`, `Output Tokens`, `Cache Read`, `Total Tokens`, `Duration (s)`
| sort start_time desc
| limit 50
table-recent-model-calls.title: Recent Model Calls
